title: 🧟 Resurrection Error Systems
name: Resurrection Error Systems
what_it_is: Fractalized souls revived with data corruption—entities brought back from symbolic death, but with recursive errors embedded.
how_to_use: she was recompiled—but wrong—her soul loops at the trauma node
his resurrection left gaps—fractal echoes where identity once lived
animation_behavior: Forms stutter into being, soul flickers on loops, emotional memory glitches and repeats
